get.description: Liveness: process is alive, with no dependency or inference probe.
Readiness with dependency checks, queue depth, and optional inference probe.

post.description: Authoritative rule validation for the workflow builder.

get.description: Lightweight poll — status and progress only (no full audit payload).
Server-Sent Events stream for live run progress (Redis pub/sub).

200.description: Server-Sent Events stream of run progress updates

schema.description: SSE `data:` frames containing JSON progress payloads

post.description: Create a run with files already uploaded to storage (presigned PUT flow).
Multipart fallback when presigned upload is unavailable.

get.description: Infer a NuExtract template leaf type from field name and intent.
Read-only platform configuration snapshot (safe AUDIT_* fields).
Effective per-model runtime knobs (platform env + host inference reference).
Document and validation model catalog with live availability.
Document model runtime status (Docker Model Runner or vLLM).

parameters.name: run_infer

schema.description: Run a short Repody VLM probe.
schema.title: Run Infer

parameters.description: Run a short Repody VLM probe.

document_types.title: Document Types
document_types.description: JSON array of configured document type names, same order as files.

markdownExtraction.title: Markdownextraction
markdownExtraction.description: Run NuExtract document-to-Markdown in parallel with field extraction.

RunSnapshotBody.title: RunSnapshotBody
RunSnapshotBody.description: Ephemeral workflow config for a single run — does not mutate the saved workflow.

apiKey.title: Apikey
apiKey.description: Plaintext key — returned only once on deploy.

bearerAuth.description: Keycloak access token (`Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`) for UI users, or a per-workflow API key for run endpoints.
